# services.xandikos

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.xandikos`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.xandikos.address` | `string` | The IP address on which Xandikos will listen. By default listens on localhost. |
| `services.xandikos.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Xandikos CalDAV and CardDAV server. |
| `services.xandikos.extraOptions` | `list of string` | Extra command line arguments to pass to xandikos. |
| `services.xandikos.nginx` | `submodule` | Configuration for nginx reverse proxy. |
| `services.xandikos.nginx.enable` | `boolean` | Configure the nginx reverse proxy settings. |
| `services.xandikos.nginx.hostName` | `string` | The hostname use to setup the virtualhost configuration |
| `services.xandikos.package` | `package` | The xandikos package to use. |
| `services.xandikos.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port of the Xandikos web application |
| `services.xandikos.routePrefix` | `string` | Path to Xandikos. Useful when Xandikos is behind a reverse proxy. |
